name: 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP
about: 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP is a general medicine that is manufactured in India. It comes in a solid dosage form and is available in tablet form with a dosage of 50 mg. This medicine is used to treat type 2 diabetes and is suitable for people who are unable to control their blood sugar levels through diet and exercise alone. The medicine works by slowing down the digestion of carbohydrates in the body, which helps to prevent spikes in blood sugar levels after meals. It is recommended to store this medicine in a dry place to maintain its effectiveness.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP is one tablet three times a day, taken with the first bite of each main meal.

faq.q: How does 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP help in controlling blood sugar levels?
faq.a: 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP slows down the digestion of carbohydrates in the body, which helps to prevent spikes in blood sugar levels after meals.

faq.q: What are the side effects of 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP?
faq.a: Common side effects of 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP include stomach pain, diarrhea, gas, and bloating.

faq.q: Is 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP safe for pregnant women?
faq.a: There is limited information available on the safety of 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP for pregnant women. It is recommended to consult a doctor before taking this medicine during pregnancy.

faq.q: Is a prescription required to purchase 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP?
faq.a: Yes, a prescription is required to purchase 50 MG Acarbose Tablets IP. It is recommended to consult a doctor before taking this medicine.
